auth.name: Name
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign In
auth.dontHaveAccount: Don't have an account? Sign Up
auth.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?

onboarding.title: ChargeTap
onboarding.subtitle: EV Charging Made Simple
onboarding.feature1Desc: Just tap your phone on the charger
onboarding.feature2Desc: See all fees before you start
onboarding.feature3Desc: Watch your costs as you charge

guest.banner: You're browsing as a guest. Sign in to charge.
guest.loginToChargeDesc: Starting a charge requires payment authorization and a receipt.
guest.loginForHistoryDesc: Your charging history and receipts are linked to your account.
guest.loginForProfileDesc: Your profile settings are linked to your account.
guest.loginForPaymentDesc: You need an account to add or manage payment methods.
guest.viewPricingAsGuest: You're viewing prices as a guest. Sign in to start a charging session.

pricing.title: Pricing Details
pricing.penaltyRule: Penalty begins {{minutes}} min after full charge: {{rate}}/min (max {{max}})
pricing.pricesLocked: These prices will be locked for your session. You'll see real-time costs while charging.
pricing.pricingInfoGuest: You're viewing prices as a guest. Sign in to start a charging session.
pricing.lockedForSession: These prices will be locked for your session. You'll see real-time costs while charging.

session.confirmStop: Are you sure you want to stop charging?
session.confirmCancel: Are you sure you want to cancel?
session.confirmStopDesc: Your session will end and you will be charged for the energy used.
session.helpContact:
Contact support at:

Phone: 1-800-CHARGE
Email: support@chargetap.com

receipt.title: Charging Receipt
receipt.thankYou: Thank you for charging with ChargeTap!

history.title: Charging History
history.noSessionsDesc: Your completed sessions will appear here.

payment.chargeAfterSession: Your card will be charged after each session
payment.demoMode: This is a demo - enter any test card number
payment.securePayment: Your payment info is securely processed. We never store your full card details.

nfc.title: Phone as Card
nfc.description: Use your Android phone to charge at any station that supports NFC.
nfc.feature3: Works like a physical charging card
nfc.androidOnly: Phone-as-Card is only available on Android devices with NFC
nfc.createTokenDesc: We'll create a unique virtual charging card linked to this device and your account.
nfc.step1: Make sure NFC is enabled on your phone
nfc.step2: Hold your phone against the NFC reader on the charger
nfc.step3: Wait for confirmation and start charging!
nfc.screenOffNote: Your screen doesn't need to be on. HCE works even when your phone is locked.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.sessionUpdatesDesc: Get notified when your session starts, completes, or ends
notifications.penaltyAlertsDesc: Receive warnings before and when idle fees begin
notifications.paymentReceiptsDesc: Get notified about payment status and receipts
notifications.costMilestonesDesc: Get updates when your session reaches cost thresholds
notifications.penaltyPrealertDesc: How many minutes before idle fee starts
notifications.quietHoursDesc: Don't send non-critical notifications during these hours
notifications.pushRequired: Sign in to enable push notifications across devices
notifications.permissionRequired: Enable notifications to receive charging updates

sessionStarted.title: Charging Started
sessionStarted.body: Your charging session at {{station_name}} has begun.

chargingComplete.title: Charging Complete
chargingComplete.body: Your vehicle is fully charged! Total: {{total}}. ({{energy}} kWh)

penaltyStartsSoon.title: Idle Fee Warning
penaltyStartsSoon.body: Idle fee starts in {{minutes}} min at {{station_name}}. Rate: {{rate}}/min.

penaltyStarted.title: Idle Fee Active
penaltyStarted.body: Idle fee is now active at {{station_name}}. {{rate}}/min. Please move your vehicle.

penaltyCapReached.title: Idle Fee Capped
penaltyCapReached.body: Maximum idle fee of {{max_fee}} reached at {{station_name}}.

sessionStopped.title: Session Ended
sessionStopped.body: Your session at {{station_name}} has ended. Total: {{total}}.

sessionInterrupted.title: Session Interrupted
sessionInterrupted.body: Your session at {{station_name}} was interrupted. Reason: {{reason}}.

paymentSucceeded.title: Payment Successful
paymentSucceeded.body: Payment of {{total}} completed. Receipt available in app.

paymentFailed.title: Payment Failed
paymentFailed.body: Payment of {{total}} failed. Please update your payment method.

costMilestone.title: Cost Update
costMilestone.body: Your session has reached {{total}}. Currently at {{energy}} kWh.

tap.title: Ready to Charge
tap.instruction: Tap your phone on the charger's NFC reader to begin
tap.instructionGuest: Tap to view pricing and availability
tap.productionNote: In production, you would tap your phone on the physical charger

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.paymentMethodRequired: Please add a payment method first.
errors.sessionAlreadyActive: You already have an active session.
errors.cannotStopSession: Only the account that started this session can stop it.
